description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a combination of flat and gable roofs, surrounded by a well-maintained yard and enclosed by a wooden fence. The front facade features large, rectangular windows and a prominent entryway with a paved driveway leading to a double garage. The landscaping includes several trees and shrubs, with a curved walkway connecting the driveway to the main entrance. The rear of the house has a spacious patio area and additional green space, while the side elevations show a mix of window sizes and a clear separation between living and garage spaces. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, contrasting with the dark roof and window frames. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of natural and built elements.
description: A modern two-story house with large windows, a mix of flat and gable roofs, and landscaped front and back yards enclosed by a wooden fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, double garage, large windows, and landscaped yard with trees and a curved driveway.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the flat-roofed garage, backyard patio, and additional green space with trees and shrubs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat-roofed section, extensive windows, patio area, and the full length of the backyard fence.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the gable roof, side yard, and the arrangement of trees and driveway leading to the front.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Prominent main door with a paved walkway, no porch, flanked by landscaping and large windows, leading to a double garage.
